query: glitch art pixel sorting digital corruption datamoshing
message: sub:digital_artifacts/glitch — anti_aesthetic — pixel sorting, color shifts, datamosh, digital corruption

response.objective_caption: A dark silhouetted city skyline with irregular building profiles occupies the lower portion of the frame, separated from an upper field of dense horizontal striations by a narrow transitional band. The upper two-thirds display layered red and yellow wave-like patterns resembling water or atmospheric textures. Along the horizon edge, traces of blue and bright yellow outline the jagged contours of the dark landmass.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A dark silhouetted city skyline sits beneath an upper field of dense horizontal striations suggesting rippling water, rendered in aggressively clashing toxic neon reds, yellows, and electric blues that create visual tension across the entire frame. The image abandons representational clarity in favor of abstract formal qualities, prioritizing extreme color, shape, and texture so that the skyline and wave-like patterns become secondary to the graphic impact.
